OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS FOR PERSONAL MEDICAL RECORDS OF PLTF FILED BY DEFENDANT EUROMOTORS INC DBA MERCEDES-BENZ OF SAN FRANCISCO

DISCOVERY 610, PLAINTIFF XIAO WANG'S MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS FOR PERSONAL MEDICAL RECORDS OF PLAINTIFF IS GRANTED AS IT SEEKS TO LIMIT THE PRODUCTION OF RECORDS TO THE TIME PERIOD OF 10 YEARS PRIOR TO THE INCIDENT TO PRESENT. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Subpoenas For Personal Medical Records Of Pltf;
Off Calendar Feb-24-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Lori Wallerstein, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: XIAO WANG

No ohter appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF XIAO WANG's Motion To Quash Subpoenas For Personal Medical Records Of Plaintiff is granted as it seeks to limit the production of records to the time period of 10 years prior to the incident to present. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
